title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM TWENTY-ONE OF THE PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF QUEZON, SUB-SECTION (a), TITLE A, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIX HUNDRED SEVENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 885 / 51 OG No. 4, 1795 (April, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1208, April 20, 1955 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM TWENTY-ONE OF THE PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF QUEZON, SUB-SECTION (a), TITLE A, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIX HUNDRED SEVENTY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item twenty-one of the public works projects for the Province of Quezon, subsection (

a

), title A, section one of Republic Act Numbered Six hundred seventy, is to read as follows:

"21. For the construction of the Sto.

Cristo School Building, Sariaya â¦â¦â¦. P5,000.00.â

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, April 20, 1955.
